column27: Her car, windows, porch were totally covered with sand. See the photos. She has a neighbor who would only go outside with a mask, that hadn't occured to her as a health impact. The mine across the street sent a workman over to offer to wash the house as compensation, (they did a terrible job). Her car windows wouldn't roll down because of the sand in the mechanism, and she paid to fix it, because she was so fed up.

column27: Heavy cloud of airborne sand coming off of tractor trailer exiting mine, still swirling in the air after it goes by.  Have already completely clear-cut and stripped phase 3 despite still actively mining and have a long way to go phase 2, violating permit.  Destroying required 50’ buffer to State Forest.  All of phase 2 and much of phase 1 is uncovered sand, despite stormwater regulations.  Sorry no photo - driving.
column36: Overcast, wind ~3 on Beaufort Scale, no precipitation
